title: Phase 6B: Receiving module - photo capture, vendor issue, AP hold bridge
description: Build receiving module secondary components: photo capture during receiving, vendor issue creation flow, and receiving-to-AP hold workflow bridge.
steps: Create src/components/receiving/photo-capture.tsx with camera integration for receiving photos
Support multi-photo capture, annotation, and S3 upload
Create src/components/receiving/vendor-issue-form.tsx with vendor issue creation flow
Include issue type (short, damage, wrong product, quality), photo attachment, and claim initiation
Create src/lib/services/receiving-ap-bridge.ts with receiving-to-AP hold workflow
Implement automatic AP hold when receiving discrepancies exceed threshold
